calendar.matters:
Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Yevgeniy Grats Trustee And Appointment Of Maksim Gr
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Yevgeniy Grats Trustee And Appointment Of Maksim Gr
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Continued To Jun-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Maksim Grats.
John Boesennecker for and with Gene Grats.

Mr. Freedman stated that they have conducted some discovery, that the property is listed and he believes there is an offer, and that half of the proceeds are in cash. Mr. Freedman also stated that he is concerned about the security of the cash, that there is a minor Beneficiary and that he filed a supplement requesting bond (about $250,000.00). Mr. Boessenecker stated that the parties could not agree on an amount to go into a secured account, that they spoke of a blocked account or a mechanism on how to secure an account, and that the parties are agreeable to a bond. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 7, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 14, 2017. The Petition for Suspension of Powers and Removal of Yevgeniy Grats Trustee and Appointment of Maksim Grats is continued to and the Parties are to return on June 21, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. A copy of the mediation order was provided to Counsel in open Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
